history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two young men are posed side by side indoors against contrasting light and dark walls.

Main Subject:
The focus is on two young men standing close together and looking at the camera.

Setting:
The image appears to be taken indoors. The left side shows a pale wall near a doorway or panel, while the right side shows a darker wall or open area. Lighting is uneven, with cooler light on the left subject and dimmer, warmer light on the right subject.

Visual Details:
The left person has short dark hair styled with volume on top, light skin, and a neutral expression. He wears a plain light-colored V-neck T-shirt and stands slightly turned toward the camera with his arms lowered out of frame; his gaze is directed forward. The right person has short dark hair and light skin, with a slight smile and a more relaxed face. He wears a dark T-shirt with a graphic logo across the chest that includes readable text that appears to start with “Be” and ends with “RUNN.../UN...” (the rest is unclear). He stands facing the camera at a similar angle, with his head slightly tilted. The camera angle is straight-on at about chest/upper-body height, and the composition places the two subjects side by side, with the lighting contrast emphasizing the separation between the bright left background and dark right background.

Visible Text:
“Be... RUNN...” (the remaining text is unclear)

Practical Summary:
The photo shows two young men posing indoors, framed from the chest up. One wears a light V-neck T-shirt and the other wears a dark graphic T-shirt, with uneven lighting between the left and right sides of the background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A medium shot portrait of two young Asian men sitting side-by-side outdoors at night. The man on the left, with dark, styled hair, wears a plain white t-shirt and looks to his left with a thoughtful expression. The man on the right, with curly dark hair, wears a black t-shirt with a graphic design featuring text and a compass-like emblem. He looks directly at the camera with a gentle smile. The background is split, with the left side showing a light blue, textured wall or surface, and the right side being a dark, out-of-focus area, suggesting a dimly lit outdoor setting. The lighting is soft and appears to come from the front, illuminating the faces of the subjects while leaving the background in shadow. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of youthful camaraderie. The color palette is dominated by the white of the t-shirt, the black of the other t-shirt, and the subdued blues and dark tones of the background. The image has a slightly grainy, low-light aesthetic.
